title: The Mirror Facing Your Bed
script: Ever noticed how a mirror facing your bed can make a room feel slightly uneasy? In traditional Feng Shui, the bed is where your energy settles at night. A mirror directly facing it is said to bounce that energy back, keeping the mind more alert than rested. There is also a practical reason: reflections and movement in low light can make your brain keep checking the room. If you want a calmer bedroom, move the mirror to the side, place it inside a wardrobe door, or cover it before sleep. Feng Shui is not about fear. It is about creating a space where your body feels safe enough to fully rest.
